name: shadcn-svelte
description: Community-led Svelte port of shadcn/ui with accessible, customizable copy-paste components

description.value: Community-led Svelte port of shadcn/ui with accessible, customizable copy-paste components

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - 1,472 commits; 174 contributors; 94 releases; v1.1.0 released December 9, 2025

github-stars.comment: 8,000 stars with 495 forks as of December 2025

framework.comment: Svelte-only; specifically for Svelte 5 and SvelteKit applications

styling-approach.comment: Built on Tailwind CSS; supports Tailwind v4 with backward compatibility for v3

component-model.comment: Copy-paste styled components; code is owned by developer after installation; built on Bits UI headless primitives

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (85.3% of codebase); first-class type definitions

ssr-compatible.comment: Works with SvelteKit (SSR by default); also supports Vite and Astro

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Svelte library, not React

design-system.comment: Port of shadcn/ui design; provides customizable theming via CSS variables; multiple themes available

dark-mode.comment: Built-in dark mode via mode-watcher system; supports system preference detection, localStorage persistence, and class-based theming

theming-system.comment: Comprehensive theming via CSS custom properties; customizable colors, typography, and spacing

css-variables.comment: Uses CSS custom properties for theming; hex values for light (#ffffff) and dark (#09090b) modes

design-tokens.comment: Color themes with light/dark variants; design tokens configurable via CSS variables

rtl-support.comment: Not explicitly documented; may inherit RTL support from underlying Bits UI

component-count.comment: 60 components including form inputs, data display, overlays, navigation, and layout components; expanding

select.comment: Select component; also has Native Select for native browser select

multi-select.comment: No dedicated multi-select component; use Combobox for searchable selection

combobox.comment: True combobox with search/autocomplete; combines Popover and Command components; filters list in real-time

switch-toggle.comment: Switch and Toggle components; Toggle Group for multiple toggles

number-input.comment: No dedicated number input with increment/decrement; use native input type=number

tag-input.comment: No dedicated tag input component; available in shadcn-svelte-extras community extension

pin-input.comment: Input OTP component for PIN/OTP codes; accessible with copy-paste functionality; built on Bits UI PinInput

date-picker.comment: Date Picker via Calendar component with popover; includes Date of Birth picker, Date and Time picker, and Natural Language picker variants

time-picker.comment: Date and Time picker documented; uses HTML time input combined with calendar

date-range-picker.comment: Range Calendar component for selecting date ranges; multi-month view; built on @internationalized/date

input-groups.comment: Input Group component for combining inputs with addons

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated component; can compose with Input Group and Select

button-groups.comment: Button Group and Toggle Group components

split-button.comment: No dedicated split button; can compose with Button and Dropdown Menu

table.comment: Table component for basic data tables

data-table.comment: Data Table built on TanStack Table v8; supports sorting, filtering, pagination, row selection, and column visibility

virtual-infinite-list.comment: No virtual scrolling documented in Data Table guide

list-view.comment: Item component for styled list items

card.comment: Card component with header, content, and footer sections

avatar.comment: Avatar component with image and fallback support

tag-chip-pill.comment: Badge component can serve as tags/chips

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month view; supports multiple months, locale, and customization via snippets

alert.comment: Alert component; also Alert Dialog for confirmations

toast-notification.comment: Sonner component - opinionated toast for Svelte; supports success, error, warning, info, and promise toasts

empty-state.comment: Empty component for empty state placeholders

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component with title, description, header, footer; Alert Dialog for confirmations; built on Bits UI with WAI-ARIA compliance

drawer-sheet.comment: Drawer component built on Vaul Svelte; supports multiple directions (top, bottom, left, right); Sheet component also available

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu component for action menus

context-menu.comment: Context Menu component for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Command component - fast, composable command menu; supports search, groups, keyboard navigation (⌘J); Dialog variant available

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

vertical-tabs.comment: Tabs component available but vertical orientation not explicitly documented

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation Menu component with dropdowns; Menubar also available

sidebar.comment: Composable, themeable sidebar component; supports collapsible modes (offcanvas, icon, none); variants (sidebar, floating, inset); pre-built blocks available

grid.comment: Use Tailwind CSS grid utilities directly

stack.comment: Use Tailwind CSS flex utilities directly

container.comment: Use Tailwind CSS container class directly

resizable.comment: Resizable component built on PaneForge; accessible with keyboard support; horizontal and vertical layouts

splitter.comment: Resizable component provides splitter functionality with PaneGroup, Pane, and Handle

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

chart-libraries.comment: Chart components using LayerChart under the hood; supports bar, area, and line charts; no abstraction - follows LayerChart upgrade paths

form-libraries.comment: Form validation with Zod; Field component for form field wrapper; Superforms integration documented

animation-libraries.comment: Uses Svelte transitions and built-in animations; Drawer uses Vaul Svelte for smooth animations

icon-libraries.comment: Uses Lucide Svelte for icons throughout documentation and examples

date-libraries.comment: Uses @internationalized/date for date handling and localization; chrono-node for natural language parsing

aria-compliant.comment: Built on Bits UI which provides WAI-ARIA compliance; Dialog uses semantic HTML with proper ARIA attributes

keyboard-navigation.comment: Keyboard navigation by default via Bits UI; Escape closes dialogs, Tab navigation with focus trapping

screen-reader-tested.comment: Screen reader support built-in via Bits UI; sr-only text for close buttons and other controls

focus-management.comment: Focus management via Bits UI; dialogs trap focus, focus returns to trigger on close

wcag-level.comment: No specific WCAG level documented; Bits UI mentions WAI-ARIA compliance but not specific level

accessibility-rating.comment: Good - Built on Bits UI with WAI-ARIA compliance, keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and focus management; date components inspired by React Spectrum accessibility excellence

bundle-size-full.comment: Copy-paste model means components become your code; no package bundle size - depends on which components are used and Tailwind purging

bundle-size-core.comment: No core bundle; components are copied into project and become part of application code

tree-shakeable.comment: Copy-paste model means only used components are included; Tailwind CSS purges unused utilities

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for interactive components via Bits UI

lazy-loading.comment: Components can be loaded on demand; standard Svelte/SvelteKit code splitting

documentation-quality.comment: Excellent documentation with interactive examples, installation guides, API reference, blocks/templates, dark mode guide, and multiple framework setup guides (SvelteKit, Vite, Astro)

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes live component examples, playground, and pre-built blocks (dashboard, tasks, authentication)

figma-kit.comment: Official Figma UI Kit available at figma.com/community; every component recreated with customizable props, typography, and icons; open sourced by Pietro Schirano

cli-generator.comment: CLI tool for adding components: pnpm dlx shadcn-svelte@latest add [component]; cross-framework distribution support

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: ~7,856 weekly downloads as of December 2025; classified as popular

commercial-support.comment: MIT licensed open source; community support via Discord; no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Full control via className and Tailwind classes; CSS variables for theming; code is yours to modify

compound-components.comment: Composable sub-component pattern (Dialog.Title, Dialog.Description, Command.Group, etc.)

render-props.comment: Svelte snippets pattern for custom rendering (e.g., custom day rendering in Calendar)

slots.comment: Svelte native slots for content injection

unstyled-mode.comment: Built on Bits UI headless primitives; can access underlying unstyled components directly
